stemHtml: According to ICAO guidance for holding procedures, all turns in nil wind should be at a…

options.a: 20° bank angle, or 3° per second; whichever is lesser.
options.b: 25° bank angle, or 3° per second; whichever is lesser.
options.c: 20° bank angle, or 3° per second; whichever is larger.
options.d: 25° bank angle, or 3° per second; whichever is larger.
